title: Playground Operations Desk
concept: A dense three-pane console that keeps creation sources, saved Playgrounds, the live WordPress frame, and Site Manager tools visible together instead of scattering core actions across separate overlays.
flows: Start a Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, or featured blueprints.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible copy progress.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with rename, delete, and resume affordances.
Inspect and edit Site Manager settings, files, blueprint JSON, database tools, logs, and export actions while the live site remains visible.
Browse and filter the Blueprint gallery before running a selected Blueprint.
